conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
I don't know... just tired, I suppose. I have a lot on my plate, but physically I feel drained. It's hard to explain.
Can you tell me more about what feeling drained is like for you?
It's like I'm running out of steam. I try to do things, but my body just feels heavy. Even small things, like walking up the stairs, feel like climbing a mountain.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yes, definitely. I'll be reading something and suddenly I'll just zone out. I look up and I've read the same sentence three times without noticing. It's like my brain isn't really working anymore.
How long has it been since you first noticed yourself reading the same sentence over and over?
A few months, maybe? It started slowly, but now it's just normal. I don't know if I'm just getting older or what.
How have you been sleeping lately?
Not great. I wake up a lot, usually around two or three. I can't relax, so I just lie there and think about things.
What kinds of things do you find yourself thinking about when you're lying awake?
Stuff that happened during the day, mostly. I replay conversations with my boss or wonder if I should be doing something different. It's like my brain won't turn off.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
No... not really. I used to love gardening, but even that feels like too much effort now. I just don't have the energy for it.
How long has it felt like too much effort to garden?
A few weeks, maybe? It used to be my favorite thing to do, but now I look at the garden and just think, 'Maybe tomorrow.'
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
Honestly, I don't know. I try not to think about it too much. I just take it one day at a time because looking ahead feels like too much work.
What makes looking ahead feel like too much work right now?
It's just... I don't know what the future holds, and I don't have the energy to worry about it. I'm just trying to get through the day.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yes... I second-guess everything now. I'll be trying to decide what to wear and I'll change my mind five times. It's like my brain is stuck.
How long does that feeling of being stuck usually last when you're trying to decide?
It depends. Sometimes I just pick something and move on, but other times I'll be stuck for hours. I don't know if it's just me, but it feels like I'm losing my ability to decide things quickly.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No... not really. I'm just existing, I suppose. I don't have the energy to be the person I used to be, and I don't know when I will again.
Can you tell me more about what it feels like to just be existing?
It's like... I'm just here, physically. But my mind is just wandering. I'm not really living, just going through the motions.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
No... I don't know. I used to love reading, but I haven't picked up a book in months. I don't know if I'm just losing interest or if it's something else.
What about other activities that used to bring you joy—have you noticed a similar change with those?
Yes... everything feels like too much effort. I used to love playing guitar, but even just picking it up feels like climbing a hill.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
Just... myself, I suppose. I feel like I've lost my spark, and I don't know how to get it back.
Can you tell me more about what it feels like to have lost that spark?
It's like... I'm just a shadow of who I used to be. I don't know how to get back to that person.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
I don't know... I feel like I've let everyone down, even if it's just in my own mind.
Who do you feel you've let down the most?
My family, probably. They were always counting on me to be the strong one, and now... I just don't know if I can be that person anymore.
When did this sense of emptiness start feeling this strong?
A few months ago, I think. It just sort of crept up on me.
What parts of life feel most difficult or empty lately?
Everything. I don't know if it's just me, but even things I used to love feel empty now.
How's your appetite been?
It's been off for a while. I just don't have the energy to eat much.
How long has your energy been affecting your appetite?
A few months, I suppose. It started slow, but now it's just normal.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yes... I get overwhelmed really easily now. I don't know if it's just me, but it feels like everything is just too much.
